message:
feat: rich compaction summaries with user messages, task list, transcript pointer

Overhaul the checkpoint and LLM summarization to preserve much more
context across compaction boundaries:

- User messages stored verbatim as JSON arrays in <user_messages> tags
  for lossless round-tripping across repeated compactions
- Agent responses (communicate result messages) captured in
  <agent_responses> tags
- Transcript path included with instruction to read_file it
- Task list snapshot shows current status of all tasks
- Activated skills extracted from use_skill tool calls
- Removed "Original task:" — user messages section is the source of
  truth for evolving intent across long sessions

Checkpoint has a 60k char budget; sheds oldest user messages first
when exceeded. LLM summarization prompt restructured with 7 sections
prioritizing user messages verbatim.

Session populates CompactionMeta (transcript path, task snapshot)
before each ManageContext call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -77,7 +77,7 @@ func (s *ObsMaskStrategy) ManageContext(ctx context.Context, history *[]Turn, sy
 	if p >= s.cm.CheckpointThreshold {
 		turnsBefore := len(*history)
 		before := EstimateTokens(*history)
-		*history = checkpoint(*history, s.cm.PreserveRecentTurns)
+		*history = checkpoint(*history, s.cm.PreserveRecentTurns, &s.cm.Meta)
 		after := EstimateTokens(*history)
 		emitFn(EventContextCompaction, ContextCompactionData{
 			Layer:           "checkpoint",
